response.original_title: 仁義 頂上編 エピソード３
response.overview: After learning that a conflict in western Kanto was sparked by development rights in the area, Yoshiro sets out to gather information. Meanwhile, Jin discovers that the one who triggered the gang war is Yoji, the son of the former head of the Ushio Group.
response.tagline: Aiming for the top, the “Jingi” duo push forward relentlessly!
response.title: 仁義 頂上編 エピソード３
